data.summary: GROK-05 MET: provenance-pinned P44-02 ran on native grok:grok-4.5 through all six gates (pass:true), attempts:1, unmetered per GROK-03, merged cb9254b intomilestone/v1.12-native-grok; docs-only, no deviations.

data.details:
✗ 45-EVIDENCE.md exists; every quoted journal line byte-matches grep output; report line matches live output; git evidence cited; failure doctrine; verdict; SUMMARY written; files limited to phase dir: File exists, report/git/doctrine/verdict/SUMMARY/scope all check out, but the evidence-gate line quoted as VERBATIM does NOT byte-match the journal: quote is 1211 bytes vs journal 1216, diverging at byte 728 ('76 +++++++++' 9 pluses in quote vs 11 in journal; 5 '+' chars dropped in the diffstat). Re-running the stated grep does not reproduce the quote — the byte-match requirement fails.
✗ GROK-05 proven from journal artifacts: grok/grok-4.5/sub/mid dispatch with pin provenance, six gate-result pass:true events, task-done attempts:1 with same assignment, merge event — each quoted byte-matching with exact ts: Journal genuinely contains all required events (verified independently: dispatch grok:grok-4.5 sub/mid with the pin provenance, all six gates pass:true, task-done attempts:1 same assignment, merge branch tickmarkr/run-20260712-003216--P44-02), and dispatch/build/test/scope/task-done/merge quotes plus the acceptance/review declared-truncated prefixes byte-match — but the evidence-gate quote fails the byte-match (5 '+' characters missing), so the 'each quoted byte-matching grep output' requirement is not met.
✓ Spend disposition honest per GROK-03: report prints 'grok:grok-4.5  unmetered (adapter reports no usage)', quoted matching live output, no numeric grok spend: Live `node dist/cli/index.js report run-20260712-003216` prints exactly 'grok:grok-4.5            unmetered (adapter reports no usage)' plus the subscription-channels line; quotes in 45-EVIDENCE.md match; no numeric grok spend shown.
✓ Git proves branch tickmarkr/run-20260712-003216--P44-02 contained in milestone/v1.12-native-grok with merge commit cb9254b, cited with exact commands and output: Independently re-ran both commands: `git branch --contains` lists milestone/v1.12-native-grok, and `git log --grep P44-02` returns cb9254b 'tickmarkr: merge P44-02 Close HYG-06…'; the cited output matches reality.
✓ Failure doctrine stated (non-grok dispatch, missing gate passes, absent/numeric report line, missing merge ⇒ GROK-05 UNMET, Phase 40 reopens), doctrine-only, pass derives from artifacts: Section 5 states the doctrine covering all four failure modes, names Phase 40 reopening as defective, and explicitly declares itself doctrine text only with the verdict derived from on-disk artifacts.

data.notes: The stall was self-inflicted, not a capability failure: the worker ran `find / -name journal.jsonl` which scanned the entire filesystem for ~35 minutes, consuming the whole window. The task itself is narrow and well-understood — the only remaining defect from attempt 0 is the evidence-gate quote missing 5 '+' characters in the diffstat. Retry with explicit guidance: the journal lives at the main repo path /Users/operator/Desktop/CodingSpace/tickmarkr/.tickmarkr/runs/run-20260712-003216/journal.jsonl (the worktree does not contain .tickmarkr/runs — never use find / to locate it). Extract the evidence gate-result line with grep from that absolute path and copy it byte-for-byte into 45-EVIDENCE.md (verify with a byte-count or cmp against the grep output before committing), keep all other already-passing sections unchanged, and emit the TICKMARKR_RESULT trailer as a single unwrapped line.

data.summary: GROK-05 MET: pinned byte-matched evidence proving native grok carried P44-02 through all six gates to a merged integration branch, with honest unmetered spend; only the twoin-scope docs were committed on the worktree branch.

data.details:
✓ 45-EVIDENCE.md exists, quoted journal lines byte-match grep output, report line matches live output, git evidence cited with commands+output, failure doctrine present, verdict stated, 45-01-SUMMARY.md written, files limited to .planning/phases/45-grok-live-dogfood/: Both files created; diff touches only .planning/phases/45-grok-live-dogfood/. I re-ran `grep '"taskId":"P44-02"'` against the journal and every quoted line in 45-EVIDENCE.md (dispatch, all six gate-results including the full evidence diffstat with intact '+' runs, task-done, merge) matches the grep output byte-for-byte with exact ts values. Live `node dist/cli/index.js report run-20260712-003216` output contains the quoted grok line verbatim. Git commands and outputs are cited and reproduce. Failure doctrine (§5) and verdict (§6, also up front) present.
✓ GROK-05 proven from on-disk artifacts: task-dispatch with adapter grok / grok-4.5 / sub / mid and provenance 'pin grok:grok-4.5 (task hint, 44-02-PLAN.md)', six gate-result pass:true events, task-done attempts:1 with same grok assignment, merge to tickmarkr/run-20260712-003216--P44-02, each quoted byte-matching with exact ts: Verified live: journal contains task-dispatch at 2026-07-11T21:32:53.577Z with assignment {adapter:grok, model:grok-4.5, channel:sub, tier:mid} and the exact provenance string; gate-result pass:true for build/test (21:37:41.754Z), evidence (21:37:41.794Z), scope (21:37:41.822Z), acceptance (21:42:39.537Z), review (21:43:24.692Z); task-done attempts:1 with identical grok assignment and merge to tickmarkr/run-20260712-003216--P44-02 both at 21:43:24.829Z. All eight events quoted verbatim in 45-EVIDENCE.md with matching ts values.
✓ Spend disposition honest per GROK-03: report prints 'grok:grok-4.5  unmetered (adapter reports no usage)', quoted matching live output; fails if absent or numeric: Live report output line 11 is '  grok:grok-4.5            unmetered (adapter reports no usage)' — present, non-numeric, and quoted byte-exact (including the 2 leading spaces) in 45-EVIDENCE.md §3, which explicitly frames unmetered as the documented GROK-03 disposition, not an implicit zero.
✓ Git proves branch tickmarkr/run-20260712-003216--P44-02 is contained in milestone/v1.12-native-grok (merge commit cb9254b), cited with exact commands and output: Re-ran both commands: `git branch --contains tickmarkr/run-20260712-003216--P44-02` lists milestone/v1.12-native-grok (current HEAD, '*'), and `git log --oneline milestone/v1.12-native-grok --grep P44-02` returns 'cb9254b tickmarkr: merge P44-02 Close HYG-06...'. Both commands and their outputs are cited verbatim in 45-EVIDENCE.md §4.
✓ 45-EVIDENCE.md states the failure doctrine (missing gates / non-grok adapter / absent-or-numeric report line / missing merge → GROK-05 UNMET, Phase 40 reopens), doctrine text only with the pass derived from artifacts: §5 enumerates every required failure mode (missing dispatch or non-grok adapter, any absent gate-result pass event, missing/multi-attempt task-done, wrong/missing merge branch, absent-or-numeric report line, no git containment), states GROK-05 would be UNMET and Phase 40 would reopen as defective, and explicitly scopes itself as doctrine text only, with the pass being the logical AND of §§1–4 artifact checks.
